epics.title: Payment Gateway Integration
epics.description: Integration with a payment gateway (Stripe) for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments, so that I can purchase products and services
stories.description: Integrate Stripe payment gateway for credit card payments
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully processes a credit card payment and updates the order status
The system handles declined credit card payments and displays an error message to the customer

tasks.title: Set up Stripe payment gateway API
tasks.description: Configure Stripe API keys and set up payment processing

tasks.title: Implement credit card payment form and validation
tasks.description: Create a secure payment form and validate user input

tasks.title: Test credit card payment processing and error handling
tasks.description: Test payment processing and error handling for declined payments

stories.title: As a customer, I want to manage my subscriptions, so that I can update or cancel my recurring payments
stories.description: Integrate Stripe subscription management for recurring payments
acceptance_criteria: The system allows customers to update their subscription plans and payment methods
The system cancels subscriptions and stops recurring payments when requested by the customer

tasks.title: Implement subscription management API with Stripe
tasks.description: Configure Stripe subscription API and integrate with the system

tasks.title: Create subscription management UI for customers
tasks.description: Design and implement a user-friendly subscription management interface

tasks.title: Test subscription management and cancellation
tasks.description: Test subscription updates, cancellations, and recurring payment stops

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to receive payment event notifications, so that I can track and manage payments
stories.description: Integrate Stripe webhook for payment event handling and notification
acceptance_criteria: The system receives and processes payment event notifications from Stripe
The system sends email notifications to customers and administrators for successful payments

tasks.title: Set up Stripe webhook for payment event notifications
tasks.description: Configure Stripe webhook and set up payment event handling

tasks.title: Implement payment event processing and notification logic
tasks.description: Create logic to process payment events and send notifications

tasks.title: Test payment event handling and notification
tasks.description: Test payment event processing, notification, and email sending

epics.title: User Authentication System
epics.description: A comprehensive system for user authentication, including login, signup, password reset, and OAuth integration

stories.title: As a user, I want to login to the system using email and password, so that I can access my account securely
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using their email and password, with proper validation and error handling
acceptance_criteria: The system validates user credentials correctly and allows login with valid email and password
The system displays an error message when the user enters an invalid email or password
The system redirects the user to the dashboard after successful login

tasks.title: Implement email and password login functionality
tasks.description: Create a login form with email and password fields, and implement backend logic to validate user credentials

tasks.title: Add input validation and error handling for login form
tasks.description: Validate user input on the client-side and display error messages for invalid email or password

tasks.title: Implement redirect to dashboard after successful login
tasks.description: Redirect the user to the dashboard after successful login, and update the user's session accordingly

stories.title: As a user, I want to signup for an account, so that I can use the system's features
stories.description: The system should allow users to signup for an account, with proper validation and email verification
acceptance_criteria: The system validates user input correctly and creates a new account with valid information
The system sends a verification email to the user's email address after signup
The system displays an error message when the user enters an invalid email or password

tasks.title: Implement user signup form with validation
tasks.description: Create a signup form with required fields, and implement backend logic to validate user input

tasks.title: Add email verification functionality after signup
tasks.description: Send a verification email to the user's email address after signup, and update the user's account status accordingly

tasks.title: Implement error handling for invalid signup input
tasks.description: Display error messages for invalid email or password, and prevent account creation with invalid input

stories.title: As a user, I want to reset my password, so that I can recover my account
stories.description: The system should allow users to reset their password, with proper validation and email notification
acceptance_criteria: The system validates user input correctly and sends a password reset email to the user's email address
The system allows the user to reset their password with a valid reset token
The system displays an error message when the user enters an invalid email or reset token

tasks.title: Implement password reset form with validation
tasks.description: Create a password reset form with required fields, and implement backend logic to validate user input

tasks.title: Add password reset email functionality
tasks.description: Send a password reset email to the user's email address with a valid reset token

tasks.title: Implement password reset logic with token validation
tasks.description: Allow the user to reset their password with a valid reset token, and update the user's password accordingly

stories.title: As a user, I want to login using OAuth with Google and GitHub, so that I can access my account securely
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using OAuth with Google and GitHub, with proper validation and redirect
acceptance_criteria: The system redirects the user to the Google and GitHub OAuth login pages correctly
The system validates the OAuth response and logs the user in successfully
The system displays an error message when the OAuth login fails

tasks.title: Implement OAuth login with Google
tasks.description: Integrate Google OAuth login functionality, and implement backend logic to validate OAuth response

tasks.title: Implement OAuth login with GitHub
tasks.description: Integrate GitHub OAuth login functionality, and implement backend logic to validate OAuth response

tasks.title: Add error handling for OAuth login failures
tasks.description: Display error messages for OAuth login failures, and prevent account access with invalid OAuth response

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.description: A system for sending transactional emails to users for important events

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to integrate the email notification system with SendGrid, so that I can send transactional emails to users
stories.description: Integrate the email notification system with SendGrid to enable sending of transactional emails
acceptance_criteria: The system can send emails to users using SendGrid
The system can handle email sending failures and retries
The system can track email sending metrics using SendGrid

tasks.title: Set up SendGrid account and API credentials
tasks.description: Create a SendGrid account, generate API credentials, and configure the account for transactional email sending

tasks.title: Implement SendGrid API integration in the email notification system
tasks.description: Use the SendGrid API to send emails from the email notification system, handling failures and retries

tasks.title: Test and verify SendGrid integration with the email notification system
tasks.description: Test the SendGrid integration with the email notification system, verifying that emails are sent correctly and metrics are tracked

stories.title: As a developer, I want to create email templates for different types of transactional emails, so that I can customize the content and layout of emails
stories.description: Create email templates for welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications
acceptance_criteria: The system can render email templates with dynamic content
The system can handle different email template formats (e.g. HTML, plain text)
The system can store and manage multiple email templates

tasks.title: Design and create email templates for each type of transactional email
tasks.description: Create email templates for welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications, using a templating engine

tasks.title: Implement email template rendering in the email notification system
tasks.description: Use a templating engine to render email templates with dynamic content, handling different formats and storing templates

tasks.title: Test and verify email template rendering and management
tasks.description: Test the email template rendering and management functionality, verifying that templates are rendered correctly and stored properly

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive welcome emails and password reset links, so that I can complete the onboarding process and recover my account
stories.description: Send welcome emails and password reset links to users, enabling them to complete the onboarding process and recover their accounts
acceptance_criteria: The system can send welcome emails to new users
The system can send password reset links to users who request them
The system can track email opens and clicks for welcome emails and password reset links

tasks.title: Implement welcome email sending and tracking
tasks.description: Send welcome emails to new users, tracking email opens and clicks

tasks.title: Implement password reset link sending and tracking
tasks.description: Send password reset links to users who request them, tracking email opens and clicks

tasks.title: Test and verify welcome email and password reset link sending and tracking
tasks.description: Test the welcome email and password reset link sending and tracking functionality, verifying that emails are sent correctly and metrics are tracked

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to receive payment receipts and account notifications, so that I can monitor and manage user accounts
stories.description: Send payment receipts and account notifications to system administrators, enabling them to monitor and manage user accounts
acceptance_criteria: The system can send payment receipts to system administrators
The system can send account notifications to system administrators
The system can track email opens and clicks for payment receipts and account notifications

tasks.title: Implement payment receipt sending and tracking
tasks.description: Send payment receipts to system administrators, tracking email opens and clicks

tasks.title: Implement account notification sending and tracking
tasks.description: Send account notifications to system administrators, tracking email opens and clicks

tasks.title: Test and verify payment receipt and account notification sending and tracking
tasks.description: Test the payment receipt and account notification sending and tracking functionality, verifying that emails are sent correctly and metrics are tracked

epics.title: Admin Dashboard
epics.description: A dashboard for internal team to manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics

stories.title: As an admin, I want to manage users, so that I can control access to the platform
stories.description: The admin dashboard should allow administrators to create, edit, and delete user accounts
acceptance_criteria: The admin can create a new user account with a unique username and password
The admin can edit an existing user account's details, including username and password
The admin can delete a user account and all associated data
The system prevents duplicate usernames and invalid password formats

tasks.title: Design and implement user account creation functionality
tasks.description: Create a form for user account creation, including validation for unique usernames and strong passwords

tasks.title: Develop user account editing functionality
tasks.description: Create a form for editing existing user accounts, including validation for unique usernames and strong passwords

tasks.title: Implement user account deletion functionality
tasks.description: Create a confirmation prompt for deleting user accounts, including removal of associated data

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view analytics dashboards, so that I can monitor platform performance
stories.description: The admin dashboard should display key metrics, including active users, revenue, and system performance
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays the number of active users in the last 24 hours
The dashboard displays the total revenue generated in the last 30 days
The dashboard displays system performance metrics, including response time and error rate
The dashboard updates in real-time as new data becomes available

tasks.title: Design and implement analytics dashboard layout
tasks.description: Create a visually appealing layout for the analytics dashboard, including charts and graphs

tasks.title: Develop API integration for retrieving analytics data
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving analytics data, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics

tasks.title: Implement real-time data updates for the analytics dashboard
tasks.description: Use WebSockets or other technology to update the analytics dashboard in real-time as new data becomes available

stories.title: As an admin, I want to monitor system health, so that I can identify and resolve issues
stories.description: The admin dashboard should display system health metrics, including error logs and system performance
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays the number of errors in the last 24 hours
The dashboard displays system performance metrics, including CPU usage and memory usage
The dashboard displays error logs, including timestamp, error message, and affected users
The dashboard updates in real-time as new data becomes available

tasks.title: Design and implement system health metrics display
tasks.description: Create a visually appealing display for system health metrics, including charts and graphs

tasks.title: Develop API integration for retrieving system health data
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving system health data, including error logs and system performance metrics

tasks.title: Implement real-time data updates for system health metrics
tasks.description: Use WebSockets or other technology to update system health metrics in real-time as new data becomes available

stories.title: As an admin, I want to configure platform settings, so that I can customize the user experience
stories.description: The admin dashboard should allow administrators to configure platform settings, including notification preferences and user interface customization
acceptance_criteria: The admin can configure notification preferences, including frequency and type of notifications
The admin can customize the user interface, including colors and layout
The admin can save and apply configuration changes
The system prevents invalid or conflicting configuration settings

tasks.title: Design and implement configuration settings form
tasks.description: Create a form for configuring platform settings, including validation for valid settings

tasks.title: Develop API integration for saving and applying configuration changes
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for saving and applying configuration changes, including validation for valid settings

tasks.title: Implement configuration settings validation and error handling
tasks.description: Create validation and error handling for configuration settings, including prevention of invalid or conflicting settings

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view real-time analytics, so that I can monitor platform activity
stories.description: The admin dashboard should display real-time analytics, including active users and system performance
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays the number of active users in real-time
The dashboard displays system performance metrics, including response time and error rate, in real-time
The dashboard updates in real-time as new data becomes available
The dashboard displays historical data for comparison and trend analysis

tasks.title: Design and implement real-time analytics display
tasks.description: Create a visually appealing display for real-time analytics, including charts and graphs

tasks.title: Develop API integration for retrieving real-time analytics data
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving real-time analytics data, including active users and system performance metrics

tasks.title: Implement historical data display and trend analysis
tasks.description: Create a display for historical data, including trend analysis and comparison to real-time data
